bundled_core_policy.schema_stability: Keep assets/words_core.jsonl fields stable while swapping provenance to Leipzig Corpora Collection English News 2024 1M word list + Japanese WordNet.

sources.name: Leipzig Corpora Collection English News 2024 1M word list
filters: first occurrence wins per normalized token

sources.name: Japanese WordNet database
sources.attribution_example_en: Japanese Wordnet (v1.1) © 2009-2011 NICT, 2012-2015 Francis Bond and 2016-2024 Francis Bond, Takayuki Kuribayashi
sources.attribution_example_ja: 日本語ワードネット（1.1版）© 2009-2011 NICT, 2012-2015 Francis Bond and 2016-2024 Francis Bond, Takayuki Kuribayashi
sources.attribution_guidance: Published results that directly or indirectly use Japanese WordNet data should keep the version-appropriate attribution link wording documented in third_party/licenses/Japanese-WordNet.txt.
usage: exact lemma+POS join for English lemma support

intermediate_outputs.purpose: retained/dropped diff for the bundled core rebuild
